summary_en: ¥15.0B buyback via ToSTNeT-3 on May 18, 2026; 6,307,800 shares (3.5% of shares outstanding); reference price ¥2,378/share; includes FCSR (Fully Committed Share Repurchase) component with Nomura Securities providing up to 2,800,000 shares; adjustment mechanism via warrant issuance ensures Nomura's cost equals arithmetic mean VWAP from May 19 onwards.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Shares and Purchase of Treasury Shares via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On May 15, 2026, Alfresa Holdings Corporation's board authorized a single-day block buyback of 6,307,800 ordinary shares (3.5% of outstanding shares) for ¥15.0 billion via off-hours trading (ToSTNeT-3) on May 18, 2026. The reference price is ¥2,378 per share (the May 15 closing price). The company employs a Fully Committed Share Repurchase (FCSR) structure whereby Nomura Securities is expected to submit sell orders for up to 2,800,000 shares, ensuring execution certainty even if retail shareholders submit limited orders. The rationale is to improve capital efficiency and enhance shareholder returns in response to evolving business conditions. For shares acquired from Nomura Securities, the company will issue warrants to Nomura Capital Investment; the warrants allow adjustment via arithmetic mean VWAP (from May 19 onwards at 99.973% of mean price) such that Nomura's effective acquisition cost equals the average price rather than the block reference price. Results will be disclosed May 18 after trading.
